$comment: Free taster of The Skin Specialist Programme. Four short lessons that demonstrate the consultation framework underneath every condition module in the full course. Lesson 04 is the soft transition into the paid programme.

parts.title: The taster
parts.body: What you'll get out of these four short lessons.

parts.title: The consultation that anchors every plan
parts.body: Why most skin plans fail at the consultation, and the structured framework that prevents it.

parts.title: Where to go from here
parts.body: The full Skin Specialist Programme, and how it picks up where this Mini ends.
